Class BaseReservationController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseReservationController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AvailableTimesListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
GuestMakeReservationController, SubscriberController, SubscriberReservationController
public abstract class BaseReservationController extends Object implements AvailableTimesListener
Abstract base controller for reservation management. Provides common functionality for reservation creation, availability checking, date picker limits, and displaying errors or confirmations. Implements AvailableTimesListener to receive updates for available times.

    Configures the date picker to allow only dates from today up to one month in the future.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseReservationController

      public BaseReservationController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets this controller as the active reservation controller and available times listener in the client. Adds a listener to the date picker to hide time selection when the date changes.

    • getNumberOfDiners

      protected int getNumberOfDiners() throws NumberFormatException
      Retrieves the number of diners entered by the user.
      Returns:
      the number of diners as an integer
      Throws:
      NumberFormatException - if the input is invalid or less than 1

    • checkAvailability

      protected void checkAvailability()
      Checks the availability of reservations for the selected date and number of diners. Sends a request to the client to fetch available times.

    • updateAvailableTimes

      public void updateAvailableTimes(List<LocalTime> times)
      Updates the available times in the UI when notified by the client.
      Specified by:
      updateAvailableTimes in interface AvailableTimesListener
      Parameters:
      times - a list of available LocalTime objects

    • showNearestAvailableTimes

      public void showNearestAvailableTimes(List<AvailableDateTimes> alternatives)
      Displays the nearest available times when the requested date is fully booked. Opens a dialog allowing the user to choose an alternative date and time.
      Parameters:
      alternatives - a list of AvailableDateTimes containing alternative options

    • submitReservation

      protected void submitReservation()
      Submits a reservation for the selected date, time, and number of diners. Validates input and sends the reservation to the client.

    • submitAlternativeReservation

      protected void submitAlternativeReservation(LocalDate date, LocalTime time, int diners)
      Submits an alternative reservation for a chosen date and time.
      Parameters:
      date - the selected reservation date
      time - the selected reservation time
      diners - the number of diners for the reservation

    • showError

      public void showError(String msg)
      Displays an error message using the SceneManager.
      Parameters:
      msg - the error message to show

    • showConfirmation

      public void showConfirmation(String msg)
      Displays a confirmation message using the SceneManager.
      Parameters:
      msg - the confirmation message to show

    • setupDatePickerLimits

      protected void setupDatePickerLimits()
      Configures the date picker to allow only dates from today up to one month in the future.

    • resetForm

      protected void resetForm()
      Resets the reservation form fields and hides the time selection.

    • hideTimeSelection

      protected void hideTimeSelection()
      Hides the time selection and confirmation button.
